=== Default pmrepconf options, new file ===
#pmrepconf 1.0
#
# pmrep.conf(5) config file created and updated by pmrepconf
#
# DO NOT UPDATE THE INITIAL SECTION OF THIS FILE.
# Any changes may be lost the next time pmrepconf is used
# on this file.
#
#+ groupdir /var/lib/pcp/config/pmlogconf
#

version=1
ignore_unknown=yes

=== Additional pmrepconf options, rewriting ===

# on this file.
#
#+ groupdir /var/lib/pcp/config/pmlogconf

# DO NOT UPDATE THE FILE ABOVE THIS LINE
# Otherwise any changes may be lost the next time pmrepconf is
# used on this file.
#
# It is safe to make additions from here on ...
#
Check options saved
